userDefinedCodeListEntries.entryDescription: Open (vend) a gate/barrier at the target lane once for one vehicle.
Hold the gate/barrier at the target lane open until released by a subsequent setDeviceState or closeLane command.
Close the target lane to further entries/exits.
Issue a lost-ticket transaction at the target lane using the lost-ticket method given in parameters.
Apply the RateTable referenced in parameters to the target lane or place.
Apply a validation from the given validation provider to the ticket/session referenced in parameters.
Request the target device transition to the state given in parameters.
Display the message given in parameters on the target device (VMS, lane display).
